lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਚਾ ਰਸੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਚਖਿਆ ਸੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਰਹੇ ਆਘਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sach sachaa ras jinee chakhiaa se tripat rahe aaghaaee |
lines.english: Those who have tasted the true essence of the True Lord, remain satisfied and fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਸੇਈ ਜਾਣਦੇ ਜਿਉ ਗੂੰਗੈ ਮਿਠਿਆਈ ਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu har ras seee jaanade jiau goongai mitthiaaee khaaee |
lines.english: They know this essence of the Lord, but they say nothing, like the mute who tastes the sweet candy, and says nothing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਉਮਰਥਲ ਸੇਈ ਜਾਣਨਿ ਸੂਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa andar umarathal seee jaanan sooleea |
lines.english: Those who have a festering boil within - they alone know its pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਵਜੀ ਵਾਧਾਈ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: gur poorai har prabh seviaa man vajee vaadhaaee |18|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru serves the Lord God; His vibration vibrates and resounds in the mind. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸੇਈ ਬਿਰਹੁ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਸਦ ਘੁਮਿ ਘੋਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: har jaaneh seee birahu hau tin vittahu sad ghum gholeea |
lines.english: Those who know the pain of separation from the Lord - I am forever a sacrifice, a sacrifice to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲਹੁ ਸਜਣੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਿਰੁ ਤਿਨ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਤਲ ਰੋਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: har melahu sajan purakh meraa sir tin vittahu tal roleea |
lines.english: O Lord, please lead me to meet the Guru, the Primal Being, my Friend; my head shall roll in the dust under His feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਿਖ ਗੁਰ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਹਉ ਗੁਲਮੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਕਾ ਗੋਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo sikh gur kaar kamaaveh hau gulam tinaa kaa goleea |
lines.english: I am the slave of the slaves of those GurSikhs who serve Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਮੇਲਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਹਿ ਸਿਰੁ ਵੇਚਿਆ ਮੋਲੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa naanak mel gur peh sir vechiaa moleea |1|
lines.english: Grant Your Grace, and lead Nanak to meet the Guru; I have sold my head to Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਚਲੂਲੈ ਜੋ ਰਤੇ ਤਿਨ ਭਿਨੀ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਚੋਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: har rang chaloolai jo rate tin bhinee har rang choleea |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the deep crimson color of the Lord's Love - their robes are drenched in the Love of the Lord.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਗਣੀ ਭਰਿਆ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਹੈ ਕਿਉ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aauganee bhariaa sareer hai kiau santahu niramal hoe |
lines.english: The body is full of mistakes and misdeeds; how can it become pure, O Saints?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗੁਣ ਵੇਹਾਝੀਅਹਿ ਮਲੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਢੈ ਧੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh gun vehaajheeeh mal haumai kadtai dhoe |
lines.english: The Gurmukh purchases virtues, which wash off the sin of egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਵਣੰਜਹਿ ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਸਚੁ ਸਉਦਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach vananjeh rang siau sach saudaa hoe |
lines.english: True is the trade which purchases the True Lord with love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਸਚੁ ਵਣੰਜਿਆ ਜਿਨਾ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak tin sach vananjiaa jinaa dhur likhiaa paraapat hoe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone purchase the Truth, who are blessed with such pre-ordained destiny. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੋਟਾ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਲਾਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tottaa mool na aavee laahaa har bhaavai soe |
lines.english: No loss will come from this, and the profit comes by the Lord's Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸੇਵੀ ਸਚੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਚੁ ਸਚਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਖਵਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: sach sevee sach man vasai sach sachaa har rakhavaale |
lines.english: Serving the True Lord, the Truth comes to dwell in the mind. The Lord, the Truest of the True, is my Protector.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਲਾਹਣਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਚਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: saalaahee sach saalaahanaa sach sachaa purakh niraale |
lines.english: I praise the True One, who alone is worthy of praise. The True Primal Being is True - this is His unique quality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਚਾ ਜਿਨੀ ਨ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਸੇ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੂੜ ਬੇਤਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: sach sachaa jinee na seviaa se manamukh moorr betaale |
lines.english: Those who do not serve the Truest of the True - those self-willed manmukhs are foolish demons.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਚਾ ਜਿਨੀ ਅਰਾਧਿਆ ਸੇ ਜਾਇ ਰਲੇ ਸਚ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: sach sachaa jinee araadhiaa se jaae rale sach naale |
lines.english: Those who worship and adore the Truest of the True, shall go and merge with the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹ ਆਲੁ ਪਤਾਲੁ ਮੁਹਹੁ ਬੋਲਦੇ ਜਿਉ ਪੀਤੈ ਮਦਿ ਮਤਵਾਲੇ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: oeh aal pataal muhahu bolade jiau peetai mad matavaale |19|
lines.english: With their mouths, they babble on about this and that, like the drunkard who has drunk his wine. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੈ ਚਲੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਕੈ ਐਸਾ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanai chalai satiguroo kai aisaa seegaar karee |
lines.english: He should walk in harmony with the Will of the True Guru; this should be his decoration.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਭਤਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਰਾਵੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa sabad bhataar hai sadaa sadaa raavee |
lines.english: The True Word of the Shabad is our spouse; ravish and enjoy it, forever and ever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਰਾਗਿ ਸੁਲਖਣੀ ਜੇ ਖਸਮੈ ਚਿਤਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree raag sulakhanee je khasamai chit karee |
lines.english: Gauree Raga is auspicious, if, through it, one comes to think of his Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗਿ ਚਲੂਲੈ ਅਤਿ ਰਤੀ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਲਗਾ ਨੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: rang chaloolai at ratee sache siau lagaa nehu |
lines.english: One who loves the True Lord is totally imbued with the Lord's Love, like the deep crimson color of the poppy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਉਬਲੀ ਮਜੀਠੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਗਹਗਹਾ ਤਿਉ ਸਚੇ ਨੋ ਜੀਉ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: jiau ubalee majeetthai rang gahagahaa tiau sache no jeeo dee |
lines.english: Like the deep crimson color of the madder plant - such is the dye which shall color you, when you dedicate your soul to the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੀ ਕਰਨਿ ਵਡਾਈਆ ਕੂੜੇ ਸਿਉ ਲਗਾ ਨੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorree karan vaddaaeea koorre siau lagaa nehu |
lines.english: False is the uttering of praises, by those who love falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਠਗੀ ਗੁਝੀ ਨਾ ਰਹੈ ਕੂੜੁ ਮੁਲੰਮਾ ਪਲੇਟਿ ਧਰੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorr tthagee gujhee naa rahai koorr mulamaa palett dharehu |
lines.english: Falsehood and deception may be covered with false coatings, but they cannot remain hidden.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਹੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਮਿਲੇ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat meh har usatat hai sang saadhoo mile piaariaa |
lines.english: In the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, the Lord's Praises are sung. In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the Beloved Lord is met.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sachaa aap hai aape nadar karee |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, He alone is True; He Himself casts His Glance of Grace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਪੁਰਖ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਧੰਨਿ ਜਨ ਹਹਿ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਪਰਉਪਕਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: oe purakh praanee dhan jan heh upades kareh praupakaariaa |
lines.english: Blessed is that mortal being, who shares the Teachings for the good of others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਵੇਖਣ ਕਉ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਈ ਲੋਚੈ ਨਵ ਖੰਡ ਜਗਤਿ ਨਮਸਕਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur vekhan kau sabh koee lochai nav khandd jagat namasakaariaa |
lines.english: Everyone longs to see the Guru; the world, and the nine continents, bow down to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਵਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਣਾਵਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੇ ਜਗੁ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har naam drirraaveh har naam sunaaveh har naame jag nisataariaa |
lines.english: He implants the Name of the Lord, and he preaches the Name of the Lord; through the Name of the Lord, the world is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੁ ਰਖਿਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਿਚਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਆਪੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tudh aape aap rakhiaa satigur vich gur aape tudh savaariaa |
lines.english: You Yourself have established the True Guru; You Yourself have adorned the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਪੂਜਹਿ ਪੂਜ ਕਰਾਵਹਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: too aape poojeh pooj karaaveh satigur kau sirajanahaariaa |
lines.english: You Yourself worship and adore the True Guru; You inspire others to worship Him as well, O Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਜਾਇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਪਾਸਹੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਕਾਲਾ ਮੁਹੁ ਜਮਿ ਮਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: koee vichhurr jaae satiguroo paasahu tis kaalaa muhu jam maariaa |
lines.english: If someone separates himself from the True Guru, his face is blackened, and he is destroyed by the Messenger of Death.
